messages.text: You bring the closing chord down on {target} and the whole resolving weight of it lands at once, ending the note of them in a single settled fall of cold. Your strike {verb} them!
{source} brings the closing chord down on you and the blow arrives resolved, the cold of it closing over the sound of your own pulse before it drives through. The strike {verb} you!
{source} brings the closing chord down on {target}, and a single low resolving tone settles through the cold as the blow lands and ends.
You swing the closing chord down at {target} and the resolving weight sweeps past, its low tone falling on through empty cold without an ending to close.
{source} swings the closing chord down at you and the settled weight passes by, dragging a wake of cold resolution where it should have struck.
{source} swings the closing chord down at {target} and the resolving blow finds only air, its low tone thinning back into the cold unfinished.

You loose the whole closing chord at once, and the ending the Coda kept from the world's last resolution falls on {target} entire, closing the note of them the way a coda closes a song! Your strike {verb} them!

{source} looses the closing chord and its long-held resolution comes down on you all together, the cold closing over you from every side at once like the silence after the final chord! The strike {verb} you!
{source} looses the closing chord into {target}, and the low resolving tone it releases stands settled in the cold air a moment too long, as if the whole song had come at last to its ending.
